compiled_state.title: [GREEN] Implement clarity-check subcommand in ticket CLI dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Implement the `clarity-check` subcommand in the ticket CLI dispatcher and ticket-lib-api.sh library.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (modify — add clarity-check case + update _usage() string)
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (modify — add ticket_clarity_check() function)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ticket_clarity_check()` added to ticket-lib-api.sh as a bare delegation: `bash "$_TICKETLIB_DIR/ticket-clarity-check.sh" "$@"; return $?`
- [ ] Function name: ticket_clarity_check (underscore, not hyphen — bash function names cannot contain hyphens)
- [ ] `clarity-check)` case added to dispatcher using: `_ensure_initialized && source ticket-lib-api.sh && _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_clarity_check "$@" && exit $?`
- [ ] _usage() string updated to include `clarity-check` with description "Score ticket clarity (JSON output: score/verdict/threshold)"
- [ ] Exit codes 0 (pass), 1 (fail), 2 (error) from ticket-clarity-check.sh pass through dispatcher chain unmodified
- [ ] SOURCEABILITY CONTRACT preserved in ticket-lib-api.sh
- [ ] _TICKETLIB_DIR used for script path (not hardcoded)
- [ ] Task e2d2-3848 RED tests turn GREEN after implementation
- [ ] ticket-clarity-check.sh is NOT modified (scope boundary)
